Product Description:

Gourmet Vanilla Beans, Whole Grade A Vanilla Pods by Its Delish

Vanilla is an orchid, and the beans are the fruit of the orchid. There's nothing quite like the gourmet vanilla beans to make your desserts stand out. Gourmet vanilla beans are primarily used in desserts like creme brulee, vanilla ice cream, cakes, cookies and custards. They can also be used for more savory recipes, smoothies, dressings, and glazes. Bon Appetit!

About It's Delish!

It's Delish was established in 1992 and is located in North Hollywood, California. It's Delish is a food manufacturer and distributor who produces over 500 gourmet food products including licorice, sour belts, taffies, caramels, Jordan almonds, chocolates, nuts, fruits, trail mixes, spices, and the spice blends. It's Delish also produces organics and all natural products. We give you the opportunity to order from the factory direct!

It’s Delish! prides itself on the four pillars that are at the foundation of everything we do.

Product Description: There’s something magical about the simple things in life—like La Fe Cajeta Obleas Flour Wafers. These thin, crispy wafers, born in the heart of Latin America, take you on a delicious journey with each bite. Particularly popular in Colombia and Venezuela, obleas have long been a cherished snack, bringing together families and friends over its light, delicate crunch. Whether enjoyed on a sunny afternoon or as a sweet indulgence at the end of a meal, these obleas.comestibles mexicanas wafers are a reminder of how food can connect us to our roots.

Known in Colombia as “ obleas.comestibles redondas colombianas,” when paired with caramel, these dulces colombianos treats are more than just a snack—they are a slice of cultural history. Mexican Obleas have traveled from Latin America to kitchens around the world, beloved for their versatility and nostalgic charm. They are a treat that transcends borders, a small taste of home for those far away from their Latin American heritage, and an exciting discovery for those new to its delights.

Beyond their irresistible flavor, La Fe obleas de amaranto offer a healthy, guilt-free snack option. With their low fat and calorie content, they’re perfect for anyone seeking a light yet satisfying indulgence. Made from simple ingredients like flour and water, these wafers are easy to digest, making them the ideal canvas for an array of toppings. Whether paired with a drizzle of caramel, a spoonful of fruit jam, or a spread of peanut butter, La Fe Obleas offer a delightful energy boost and are perfect for enjoying any time of day.

As a brand, La Fe has been bringing the vibrant flavors of Latin America to homes around the globe since 1968. Rooted in tradition, La Fe colombian snacks is committed to preserving the culinary heritage that makes Latin American cuisine so unique. Value: 2.96 Unit: Ounce
